_meta.source: Official NIST ACVP vectors — github.com/usnistgov/ACVP-Server (gen-val/json-files), master branch
_meta.note: Subset of the official FIPS 203 / FIPS 204 / FIPS 205 conformance vectors. The 'ML-KEM decaps implicit-rejection' section mixes normal and FO implicit-rejection (K = J(z||c)) ciphertexts (tagged by 'branch'); the 'ML-KEM keyCheck' section and the sigVer sections include INTENTIONALLY-INVALID inputs (testPassed=false). SLH-DSA keyGen is omitted: slhdsa==0.2.3 has no seed-based keygen.
